versions.changelog_entry: Initial prompt: survey/blind run mode, interactive TUI setup wizard, preflight hardening, calibration suite, pre-registration locking, permutation significance tests, natural control cohort, report overhaul, evidence narratives, operational QoL (checkpoint/resume, config validation, DuckDB export).

Codebase alignment audit: fix all API divergences against actual repository, orchestrator, artifact paths, scraper, and config signatures. 17 corrections across survey orchestrator, qualification, CLI, repository, dedup, preflight, pre-registration, content features, dependencies, and notebook numbering.
